name: rei-steps-in
prompt: Medium shot. Silver-haired woman stepping into dim room, closing door behind her with one hand. Ice-blue eyes cold and commanding. Pristine uniform. Light from doorway shrinking as door closes. Industrial room around her. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-unmoved
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired young man, amber eyes steady, unmoved. Slight smirk. Completely unbothered by command. Warm lighting on his face. Dark background with crosshatch pressure. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-surprise
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman, ice-blue eyes widening slightly — surprise fracturing composure. No one says no to her. Subtle crack in the mask. Cold blue lighting, sharp shadows. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-pushes-off
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired young man pushing off wall, taking a step forward toward camera. Confident posture, amber eyes intent. Heat shimmer intensifying. Industrial shelving behind him. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: Rei Ashford. The ice queen. Highest ranking in a decade.
